description.value: Price 700 gp; Slot none; CL 7th; Weight 1 lb.; Aura moderate enchantment and evocation DESCRIPTION When shattered (a standard action ), the globe floods a 30-foot radius burst in moonlight. Creatures that are affected by the light of the full moon (such as an afflicted lycanthrope ) are affected as if exposed to such light, and effects that rely on moonlight function within range of this effect. This moonlight persists for 1 minute, is treated as dim light (replacing any current illumination in the area), and is equivalent to a 4th-level light spell for the purpose of interacting with other light or darkness effects. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 350 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells light, moonstruck
